name: subagent-task-card

defaults.allowed: Caller must name allowed files, directories, or logical scope.
defaults.avoided: Avoid unrelated files, public contracts, generated artifacts, and broad refactors unless explicitly allowed.
defaults.checks: Name the smallest validation commands or review gates that prove completion.
defaults.handoff_format: Markdown sections: Task, Allowed Files, Avoid Files, Expected Output, Checks, Handoff Notes.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Create a bounded implementation task card. Goal: {goal}. Allowed: {allowed}. Avoided: {avoided}. Checks: {checks}. Handoff format: {handoff_format}
